channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: ITVX: Starmer set to announce 'game-changer' social media restrictions for under-16's | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Starmer set to announce 'game-changer' social media restrictions for under-16's | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: It is but too many ministers would resign to make this viable.
item.description: It is but too many ministers would resign to make this viable.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Badenoch to vow to scrap public sector equality duty in effort to fend off Reform
item.description: Badenoch to vow to scrap public sector equality duty in effort to fend off Reform

item.title: Reuters: UK PM Starmer set to ban 'harmful' social media for under-16s - Reuters
item.description: UK PM Starmer set to ban 'harmful' social media for under-16s - Reuters

item.title: Reuters: Big tech firms must stop young people circulating nude images, says UK PM Starmer - Reuters
item.description: Big tech firms must stop young people circulating nude images, says UK PM Starmer - Reuters

item.title: Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Last thing I’ll post on this. The Labour messaging - perhaps understandably - is only about Burnham. There is no mention of the national party. But more strikingly - there is also no mention at all of Reform or the th...
item.description: Last thing I’ll post on this. The Labour messaging - perhaps understandably - is only about Burnham. There is no mention of the national party. But more strikingly - there is also no mention at all of Reform or the th...

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham plans £2 cap on bus fares nationwide to help jobless - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham plans £2 cap on bus fares nationwide to help jobless - The Telegraph

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer rallies ministers in attempt to build support against Burnham
item.description: Starmer rallies ministers in attempt to build support against Burnham

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Chagos Islands ‘not a piece of real estate for sale’, Trump warned amid reports he wants to buy territory
item.description: Chagos Islands ‘not a piece of real estate for sale’, Trump warned amid reports he wants to buy territory

item.title: i Politics: Brexit reset deal this summer now in jeopardy
item.description: Brexit reset deal this summer now in jeopardy
